name: CSX Transportation, Inc. v. Hensley
question: Did the Tennessee Court of Appeals misread and misapply the Supreme Court's decision in Ayers such that a jury instruction should have been provided as to the standard for finding "fear of cancer" damages when CSX requested it?
description: A case in which the Court held that a court must provide jury instruction as to the standard for finding "fear of cancer" damages when requested by the defendant.
